title: About CustomERP
subtitle: Started as a Bilkent University CTIS graduation project — we turn business descriptions into working ERP systems.

mission.heading: Our mission
mission.body: Let small and mid-sized businesses stand up their own ERP without hiring a technical team. CustomERP takes a few paragraphs written by the business owner in their own language and runs them through an AI-assisted pipeline that produces a fully functional, deployable ERP project.

team.heading: The team
team.body: CustomERP was built as a graduation project by students of the Computer Technology and Information Systems (CTIS) program at Bilkent University.

tech.heading: Technology
tech.body: The frontend is React + TypeScript, the API layer runs on Node.js / Express, and the AI pipeline is a multi-agent Python FastAPI service. The project is open source and available on GitHub.

cta.heading: Ready to try it?
cta.body: Build your own ERP from a few sentences.
